description_long: This is a single bed with a light wood frame featuring both a headboard and a footboard, each with vertical slats and a gentle arch. The bed is equipped with three pull-out storage drawers integrated into the side of the frame, providing ample space for storing personal items. The mattress is topped with a teal and white patterned comforter, and two pillows—one solid blue and one with a feather-like print—rest at the head. The wood finish is smooth and polished, giving the bed a modern yet cozy appearance. The drawers are fully extended in some views, showcasing their depth and functionality. This bed is designed for both comfort and practicality, making it suitable for compact urban living spaces.
description: A light wood single bed with a slatted headboard and footboard, teal patterned bedding, and three integrated pull-out storage drawers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the footboard, the end of the mattress, and the open drawers on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the three fully extended storage drawers beneath the bed and the patterned bedding.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the headboard, pillows, and the open drawers extending from the left side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the bed frame without visible drawers, focusing on the bedding and frame design.
